---
title: "Changelog"
toc: false
---

Changes are tracked separately in each repository: the **ferx-r** R package
(`NEWS.md`) and the **ferx-core** Rust engine (`CHANGELOG.md`). Both are shown
below side by side.

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis
read_changelog <- function(local, ci) {
  path <- if (file.exists(local)) local else ci
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    return(sprintf("_Changelog source not found (`%s`)._", path))
  }
  paste(readLines(path), collapse = "\n")
}

news     <- read_changelog("../ferx-r/NEWS.md",        "/tmp/ferx-r/NEWS.md")
corelog  <- read_changelog("../ferx-core/CHANGELOG.md", "/tmp/ferx-core/CHANGELOG.md")

cat(
  ':::: {.columns}\n\n',
  '::: {.column width="48%"}\n',
  '### ferx-r (R package)\n\n',
  news, '\n',
  ':::\n\n',
  '::: {.column width="4%"}\n:::\n\n',
  '::: {.column width="48%"}\n',
  '### ferx-core (Rust engine)\n\n',
  corelog, '\n',
  ':::\n\n',
  '::::\n',
  sep = ""
)
```
